---
title: "About this site"
description: "Overview of my academic work and quantitative skills"
---
Throughout my undergraduate studies, I have developed a strong interest in quantitative approaches to political science, which is reflected in the work collected on this website. Each project highlights different aspects of my ability to handle data, employ statistical techniques, and draw meaningful conclusions from empirical analysis. Rather than presenting isolated assignments, this collection traces my intellectual development, showing how my analytical skills and confidence with quantitative methods have evolved over time in the study of political science.

---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```
